```{=typst}
#set text(fill: rgb("#4a4a4a"))
```

Quarterly on-time performance held above 80% across the network, though peak-hour services on long-distance routes remained a concern.

```{=typst}
#set text(fill: black)
```

Off-peak services consistently outperformed peak services across all routes, with the Coastal Express showing the largest gap between peak and off-peak.
